eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 1:04 AM on JUN 1, 2026 Effective until 1:04 AM JUN 2, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Missing child alert issued. MEITHOF, AMAYA 5YO WFJ ABDUCTED BY FATHER, MEITHOF, CHRISTOPHER, WMA 41 600 170 IN A RED JEEP GRAND CHER, 576QNU Oregon IN THE AREA OF ROOP / WINNIE; UNK DOT/DESTINATION. Call law enforcement with information.
